name: show_agent_network
description: Open the Odyssey.AI Agent Network so the traveler can inspect delegation and handoff traces.

name: show_booking_options
description: Open Odyssey.AI Booking and Checkout so the traveler can review flights, hotels, and payment details.

name: select_bundle
description: Select a booking bundle the traveler explicitly names. Payload id: value, overall, or neighborhood.

name: confirm_booking
description: Open the admin payment step only after the traveler explicitly confirms the selected bundle.

name: collect_payment
description: Create the admin PayPal checkout only after the traveler explicitly asks to pay. The UI remains responsible for approval and capture.

name: search_live_sabre
description: After the traveler explicitly confirms origin and destination airport codes, search fresh Sabre CERT inventory. Payload: origin and destination, each a three-letter IATA code.

name: add_expense
description: Fill and add a shared expense. Payload: description, amount, paidBy, and optional participants. Ask for missing values before emitting.

name: add_traveler
description: Add a friend after repeating the name and optional E.164 phone number and receiving explicit confirmation. Payload: name and optional phone.

name: trip_brief_ready
description: Place the finalized spoken trip request into the editable brief. Send one payload field named conversation containing a complete polished paragraph.

name: collect_maya_preferences
description: End the browser conversation and start the configured simulated-traveler preference call.

name: itinerary_command
description: Apply the traveler’s exact change to the selected itinerary day. Send their verbatim request in query; supports complete, undo, start, skip, cancel, remove, restore, and delay.

name: replan_trip
description: Re-optimize the active itinerary day for a broad disruption. Send tired, late, rain, closed, or flight-delay in type.

name: confirm_change
description: Confirm and apply the proposed active-day flight-delay recovery after the traveler explicitly agrees.

name: navigate
description: Open an Odyssey.AI page. Send page as home, planner, checkout, live, expenses, or dna.

name: show_day
description: Open a specific itinerary day on Live Trip. Send the requested positive integer in day.

name: trip_plan_created
description: Notify the voice agent that Odyssey.AI structured and saved the trip brief.

name: journeyos_context
description: Supplies the current page, destination, dates, travelers, selected booking, friends, and active itinerary day. Treat these facts as authoritative and do not restart planning.
